creator: matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
knu> Thanks for the review.  I'll commit them shortly.

Thanks also. I'll replace my X server and vmware-toolbox with this new
ports :-)

***

Note for further improvements: Maybe emulators/vmware-tools should
support dual-configulation. Since it should modify /etc/rc, it is very
hard job to do, or it cannot do by ports. There is also problem about
an invocation of checkvm program, but it can be avoided by specifying
environment variable 'LD_LIBRARY_PATH' to '/usr/lib/compat' (it's easy
to modify with a patch file).

-- -
Makoto `MAR' MATSUSHITA
